$comment: Optional config for cowork-bridge. Copy to ~/.claude/cowork-config.json (drop the $comment / $usage fields) or just delete this file — the skill works without it. See docs/configuration.md for the full schema.
$usage: If 'apps' is set, the parser scans finding bodies for these literal names and uses them to classify in-scope vs out-of-scope. If 'projectRoots' is set, the skill maps the working directory against those roots to determine the current scope (the next path segment after the matched root).
